sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ وَلِيدٌ مِنْ أَبِيهِ مَصْرُوفًا لِلْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Velid je tražio od oca džeparac za sedmicu.
sentences.translationEn: Walid asked his father for pocket money for the week.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهُ الأَبُ مَبْلَغًا صَغِيرًا وَنَصَحَهُ بِتَوْفِيرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Otac mu je dao mali iznos i savjetovao ga da ga uštedi.
sentences.translationEn: His father gave him a small amount and advised him to save it.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ وَلِيدٌ أَنْ يُنْفِقَ نِصْفَهُ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Velid je odlučio potrošiti samo polovinu.
sentences.translationEn: Walid decided to spend only half of it.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَ النِّصْفَ الآخَرَ فِي صُنْدُوقٍ صَغِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Drugu polovinu je stavio u malu kutiju.
sentences.translationEn: He put the other half in a small box.

sentences.translation: Otac je bio sretan zbog ove odluke.
sentences.translationEn: His father was happy with this decision.
